scripts.dev: infisical run --env=dev --project-config-dir ../.. -- bash ./scripts/dev-with-optional-tunnel.sh --env dev --d1-mode local -- wrangler dev --ip 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev:remote: infisical run --env=dev --project-config-dir ../.. -- bash ./scripts/dev-with-optional-tunnel.sh --env dev --d1-mode remote -- wrangler dev --ip 0.0.0.0
scripts.db:apply:local: infisical run --env=dev --project-config-dir ../.. -- bash ./scripts/with-generated-wrangler.sh --env dev --d1-mode local -- wrangler d1 migrations apply strength-db-dev --local
scripts.db:apply:remote: infisical run --env=dev --project-config-dir ../.. -- bash ./scripts/with-generated-wrangler.sh --env dev --d1-mode remote -- wrangler d1 migrations apply strength-db-dev-remote --remote
scripts.db:apply:staging: infisical run --env=staging --project-config-dir ../.. -- bash ./scripts/with-generated-wrangler.sh --env staging --d1-mode remote -- wrangler d1 migrations apply strength-db-staging --remote --env staging
scripts.db:apply:prod: infisical run --env=prod --project-config-dir ../.. -- bash ./scripts/with-generated-wrangler.sh --env prod --d1-mode remote -- wrangler d1 migrations apply strength-db-prod --remote --env prod
scripts.deploy:staging: infisical run --env=staging --project-config-dir ../.. -- bash ./scripts/with-generated-wrangler.sh --env staging --d1-mode remote -- wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:prod: infisical run --env=prod --project-config-dir ../.. -- bash ./scripts/with-generated-wrangler.sh --env prod --d1-mode remote -- wrangler deploy --env prod
